subject: Elgyem, a small round teal alien-like Pokemon with large oval markings on its head and short stubby limbs, standing on desert terrain
description: A small, round, teal-green creature stands on sandy rocky desert ground. Its oversized round head bears large oval or circular markings in a darker tone, and its short stubby limbs are held slightly outward. The background is warm amber-orange desert terrain under a dusty orange sky suggesting arid heat. The figure is small relative to the frame, lending it a vulnerable or curious quality. The overall mood is quiet and slightly eerie, the alien design evoking otherworldliness against a barren landscape.
foreground: small round teal creature with large oval head markings, stubby limbs, standing on sandy rock
background: arid desert terrain, orange-amber rock and sand, dusty warm sky
